title: Unbounded
description: Identify the issue in this C fragment.

questions.question: Which C standard library function introduces the vulnerability?

answer.explanation: strcpy() does not check the size of the destination buffer, making it dangerous when handling external input.

questions.question: What specific class of vulnerability is present?

answer.explanation: If 'input' is longer than 32 bytes, it will overwrite adjacent memory on the stack.
